summary: Iteration 53: Tested compact listing cards in The Honeypot (Shop + Trade tabs) and Delete Account feature in Settings. Fixed bug in ActiveTradeCard component. Backend tests pass 100% (5/5 passed, 3 skipped due to auth dependency). Frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: 1. Compact listing card renders as row with 64px thumbnail (w-16 h-16), album name, artist, condition pill, type badge, seller info, and price - VERIFIED via Playwright
2. Shop tab listings use divide-y layout with amber dividers (#C8861A/10) - VERIFIED via page content check
3. Trade tab listings use divide-y layout with amber dividers - VERIFIED via page content check
4. Delete Account button visible at bottom of Settings page with trash icon - VERIFIED via Playwright data-testid
5. Delete Account modal opens with 'Are you sure?' headline - VERIFIED via Playwright
6. Modal has descriptive body text about permanent deletion - VERIFIED via screenshot
7. Cancel button in modal is amber (bg-[#E8A820]) - VERIFIED via class inspection
8. Confirm button is outlined/muted (border-vinyl-black/30) - VERIFIED via class inspection
9. DELETE /api/auth/account endpoint returns 401 without auth - VERIFIED via pytest
10. DELETE /api/auth/account endpoint deletes user data and returns success when authenticated - VERIFIED via pytest (creates test user, deletes, verifies cannot login)
critical_code_review_comments: ISOPage.js Line 460-466: Shop tab correctly uses divide-y divide-[#C8861A]/10 layout for compact listing rows
ISOPage.js Line 570-575: Trade tab correctly uses divide-y divide-[#C8861A]/10 layout for compact listing rows
ISOPage.js Line 931-966: ListingCard component implements compact row design with w-16 h-16 (64px) thumbnail, font-heading album name, condition pill, type badge, seller info, and price
SettingsPage.js Line 400-408: Delete Account button with Trash2 icon at bottom of Account card
SettingsPage.js Line 413-440: Delete Account modal with DialogContent, 'Are you sure?' title, descriptive warning, outlined confirm button, amber cancel button
auth.py Line 277-339: DELETE /auth/account endpoint properly deletes all user data across 25+ collections and logs deletion to account_deletions collection

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 pytest tests passed, 3 skipped due to auth fixture dependency)

test_credentials.note: DO NOT delete demo account - test users created/deleted for deletion testing

seed_data_creation: Test listings created and cleaned up during testing (Test Album for Compact Cards, Trade Album Test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53: All P0 features verified. 1) Compact listing cards work correctly with divide-y layout, 64px thumbnails, condition pills, type badges, and price on right. 2) Delete Account modal works with proper button styling (amber Cancel, outlined Confirm). 3) Fixed bug in ActiveTradeCard component - added optional chaining for trade.offered_record?.cover_url to prevent null access crash. 4) Demo account listings are hidden from public /api/listings endpoint due to is_hidden flag but appear in /api/listings/my. 5) Account deletion logs to account_deletions collection and removes all user data across 25+ collections.

bug_fixed.fix: Changed trade.offered_record.cover_url to trade.offered_record?.cover_url (added optional chaining)
